steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The phrase "a fictionalized account of the lives of the Mirabal [blank]" is a supplementary (appositive) element describing the novel In the Time of the Butterflies. A comma already opens it after "Butterflies," so the blank must close the element with a matching comma before the main clause "can serve…"

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Evaluate all four choices:
  • Choice A — sisters, and: the conjunction "and" has nothing parallel to connect here — it creates a grammatical mismatch with the supplementary element structure. ✗
  • Choice B — sisters and: lacks the closing comma entirely and adds an unnecessary conjunction, leaving the supplementary element unenclosed. ✗
  • Choice C — sisters,: the comma pairs with the comma after "Butterflies," correctly enclosing the supplementary element and separating it from the main clause. ✓
  • Choice D — sisters: omits the closing comma, so the supplementary element runs into the main clause without proper punctuation. ✗
That is the correct answer.
